description:
ICICI Lombard has introduced the Elevate Health Insurance Plan, a cutting-edge solution designed to meet diverse healthcare needs. This video (Part 2 of a 3-part series) provides a comprehensive breakdown of all the features and benefits, including unique offerings like Reset Benefit, Bariatric Surgery Cover, In-patient Hospitalisation for
Surrogate mother, In-patient Hospitalisation for oocytedonor, ICICI elevate Wellness Program and more.

I take you through each term and condition in detail, helping you fully understand what this plan offers. By the end of this series, you'll have a clear understanding of whether the ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan suits your health insurance requirements.

For One 2 One Consultation: https://up4updates.my.canva.site/ramsingh

Time Stamp for Different Features:
0:00 - Reset Benefit
4:10 - Bariatric Surgery Cover
5:29 - In-patient Hospitalisation for
Surrogate mother
7:16 - In-patient Hospitalisation for oocytedonor
7:53 - Wellness Program
8:21 - Conclusion
fulltitle: ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance Plan | In-Depth Review (Part 2)

comments.text:
No fresh underwriting at renewal stage
where there is no change in sum insured
offered shall be applicable. Provided that
where there is an improvement in the risk
profile, the company may endeavor to
recognize that for removal of loadings at the
point of renewal."
THESE ARE THE POLICY WORDINGS. COMPANY MAY ASK FOR UNDERWRITNG FOR EVERY RENEWAL AND CAN REJECT RENEWAL OR CLAIM ON THE BASIS OF THIS.
comments.author: @vimarsakan1

comments.text:
लेकिन एक टाइम बाद ICICI बैंक add on का charge इतना बढ़ा देगी कि वो आप afford नहीं कर पाओगे और फिर जिस भी renewal पर आपने उस particular add on का premium नहीं भरा तो सब कुछ Zero हो जाएगा।👎
फिर आपकी सारी मेहनत बेकार , आपने इतने सालों तक बेनिफिट्स के चक्कर में add on का जितना भी प्रीमियम भरा वो भी बेकार।

सिर्फ पछताने के सिवाय हाथ में कुछ नहीं रहेगा फिर आप सोचोगे अब मैं कोई और कंपनी में पॉलिसी Port करा लेता हूँ। कंपनी शुरू में लालच देती है ताकि customer को product बेचा जा सके, और एक बार जब आप फंसे फिर कंपनी कस्टमर को अपने हिसाब से नाच नचाती है और यदि आप कंपनी के हिसाब से नहीं चले तो आपकी पूरी पॉलिसी आपके किसी काम की नहीं रहेगी।
